reasoning_text:
We need to score each validator based on criteria. Let's parse data.

All validators have server_version 3.0.0 (latest? assume yes). So software diligence good.

Agreement scores: we have 1h, 24h, 30d. Need near-perfect >99.9% for healthy. Many have 1.0 for 1h and 24h, but 30d varies.

We need to consider missed ledgers: high missed indicates poor.

Also domain verification: some have domain verified true, others false or null.

UNL status: some have "rpc" (maybe not in UNL). Not sure impact.

Partial: all false.

We also need to consider diversity: country distribution of network nodes: US 24, Germany 8, Finland 4, UK 3, France 2, Bulgaria 1, Sweden 1, Canada 1. Validators not mapped to countries; we can infer from domain maybe .com etc not helpful. So we cannot assign specific country; treat as neutral. But we can note many validators have domain postfiat.org etc maybe same operator. So operator concentration: many validators share same domain "postfiat.org" (v002, v016, v032, v038, v039). Also v021 domain lc66validator.postfiatcn.org (related). So those are same operator; they should get slight penalty for concentration but not huge.

Also many validators have domain null (no identity). Those get neutral.

We need to produce scores 0-100.

Let's define scoring approach:

Base score from consensus performance:

- If 30d agreement >= 0.998 (99.8%) -> high (90)
- 0.995-0.998 -> medium (80)
- 0.99-0.995 -> lower (70)
- 0.95-0.99 -> low (60)
- <0.95 -> very low (40)
- <0.90 -> 20
- 0.0 -> 0

But also consider 24h and 1h perfect.

Also missed ledgers: high missed in 30d indicates lower.

Let's compute approximate.

We'll list each validator with 30d score and missed.

v001: 0.95565 (95.565%). Missed 15897 out of 358462 (~4.44%). That's low. Score maybe 60.

v002: 1.00000 (perfect). Missed 2 out of 855080 (~0.0002%). Score high 95.

v003: 0.96626 (96.6%). Missed 25612/759204 (~3.37%). Score maybe 70.

v004: 0.97327 (97.3%). Missed 19944/746023 (~2.67%). Score 75.

v005: 0.99599 (99.599%). Missed 646/161297 (~0.4%). Score 88.

v006: 0.00835 (0.8%). Missed almost all. Score 0.

v007: 0.99781 (99.781%). Missed 900/411020 (~0.22%). Score 92.

v008: 0.99747 (99.747%). Missed 1780/704083 (~0.25%). Score 91.

v015: 0.99359 (99.359%). Missed 1976/308273 (~0.64%). Score 85.

v016: 1.00000 (perfect). Missed 1/855080. Score 95.

v017: 0.99758 (99.758%). Missed 1692/700487 (~0.24%). Score 92.

v018: 0.99877 (99.877%). Missed 692/560498 (~0.12%). Score 94.

v019: 0.95022 (95.022%). Missed 37432/752016 (~4.98%). Score 60.

v020: 0.99876 (99.876%). Missed 875/702885 (~0.12%). Score 94.

v021: 0.99595 (99.595%). Missed 1055/260468 (~0.40%). Score 88.

v022: 0.99821 (99.821%). Missed 1200/670533 (~0.18%). Score 93.

v023: 0.99824 (99.824%). Missed 1242/704083 (~0.18%). Score 93.

v024: 0.99872 (99.872%). Missed 226/176836 (~0.13%). Score 94.

v025: 0.97754 (97.754%). Missed 644/28672? Wait 24h missed 644 out of 28672 (2.24%). 30d score 0.99320 (99.32%). Missed 1292/189977 (~0.68%). Score maybe 78 (since 30d high but 24h missed moderate). But 24h missed 644 is significant; maybe lower 75.

v026: 0.99407 (99.407%). Missed 3403/573650 (~0.59%). Score 86.

v027: 0.99854 (99.854%). Missed 936/640581 (~0.15%). Score 94.

v028: 0.99165 (99.165%). Missed 808/96773 (~0.84%). Score 82.

v041: 0.99492 same as v040 but 953/187585 (~0.51%). Score 87.

v042: 0.99199 (99.199%). Missed 6093/760403 (~0.80%). Score 82.

Now adjust for operational reliability: uptime not given per validator; we have only current_index and partial false. Assume uptime good if not missing many ledgers. So we keep base.

Domain verification: verified true adds small bonus (+2). Verified false or null neutral.

Operator concentration: validators with same domain (postfiat.org) many; we may penalize each after first -2 each. Also v002 domain not verified false; v016 same domain; v032 same; v038, v039 same. So we can apply -2 to each beyond first (maybe -3). Let's decide: first gets full score, subsequent -3 each.

Also v028 domain verified true (bonus). v035 domain verified true (bonus). v036 domain verified true (bonus). v004 domain verified true (bonus). v015 domain verified true (bonus). v034? domain null.

Now compute final scores.

So add +2 to those.

Operator concentration: list of postfiat.org validators: v002, v016, v032, v038, v039. Also v021 domain lc66validator.postfiatcn.org (related). We'll treat as same operator group. So first (v002) keep base, others -3 each.
